race.comment: ENZO CHARLEY (2) is a Wilde trained galloper who is coming off a good run here over 1200m when beaten under a length. He struggled over 1400m at the Bool prior but this suits better. Lookd for a bold showing. ERAJA (3) has just found one better at his past couple, well beaten at Mt Gambier but holding second well enough last start, his first for the new yard. Expecting improvement off that. MAGIC MACHINE (10) ran a good race getting onto heavy ground at Horsham last time and comes under notice now. BEERSBEFOREMUSCATT (9) showed improvement at start two when fourth last start, beaten 2.5 lengths at this track over 1200m. Has claims.
